name: iog-cardanotimeseries-datasource
description: Grafana datasource plugin for the Cardano Timeseries HTTP server

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp src/plugin.json dist/plugin.json && webpack --config webpack.config.js --mode production
scripts.dev: mkdir -p dist && cp src/plugin.json dist/plugin.json && webpack --config webpack.config.js --mode development --watch
